operator_smoke_checklist: 1. BACKEND_FRONTEND_DEPLOY — deploy Q0020+Q0022 bundle on financegnome.omniflow.cc
2. THREE_SERVICE_COMPOSE — docker compose up flow-finance-ai + grafana + stats-forecast (FORECAST_ML_ENABLED=true)
3. GRAFANA_PROVISIONING_RELOAD — reload dashboards after AO1 JSON deploy
4. FULL_FIREFLY_SYNC — Full sync (not exchanges-only) + forecast recompute acct 114
5. AP1_SQL_PROBE — run architecture SQL on exchange_holdings; evaluate AP2 per outcome table
6. AO-1 — GET /api/v1/forecast/meta — ml_computation_id set or accurate sidecar-down copy
7. AP-1 — GET /api/v1/wealth — crypto.subtotal_eur > 0 when Bitunix wallet priced
8. AQ-1 — Wealth crypto tab — native qty + EUR + FX banner when applicable
10. AR-GRAF — /analytics/cashflow $account_id=114 — balance forecast + recent daily non-zero
11. AR1 decision — if AR-API non-zero AND AR-GRAF zero, reopen AR1 cashflow.json fix
12. AS-1 — /planning — delete non-active plan; 409 on active; five target_type options
14. REG-1 — six /analytics/{slug} embed routes without transport errors
